items.title: Polymarket has reportedly been paying creators to post fake betting videos
items.summary: The Wall Street Journal reviewed 1,105 videos along with guidance given to creators for crafting their posts.

items.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash
items.summary: Claude Guillemot, who founded Ubisoft with his four brothers, has died at the age of 69.
